turns.content: I have to be careful when ordering at restaurants — I am allergic to shellfish. Even a small amount sends me to the ER.
That is a serious allergy. Do you always check menus in advance?
Always. My favorite cuisine is Thai food, which can be tricky because of shrimp paste in some dishes.
Thai food has wonderful alternatives though — lots of dishes can be made shellfish-free.
Exactly, and I love spicy food so Thai hits all the right notes. My go-to order is green curry with tofu.
Green curry is rich and fragrant. Do you make it at home too?
I do! One thing I always leave out is cilantro — I am one of those people who tastes soap when they eat it.
The cilantro-soap phenomenon is a real genetic trait. It is more common than people realize.
